description: Cross-day revisit stability protocol for industrial semantic SLAM.
goal: Measure whether stable objects can be re-identified after several days while transient or dynamic objects remain suppressed from the long-term map layer.
prompt: warehouse rack . barrier . work table . forklift .
notes: Use label normalization when comparing open-vocabulary category variants.
Forklift-like objects should be treated as dynamic contamination candidates rather than stable map content.
